name: chain__cold_outbound_audit_output_mm007__
method: # COLD OUTBOUND Audit Output (MM007)  **Date:** 2026-02-06 **Auditor:** PRINTMAXX Ops **Method ID:** MM007 (COLD_OUTBOUND) + MM070 (WEB_REDESIGN_COLD_OUTREACH) **Status:** Planning (Phase 2) | $0 reve

stages.task: scrape 50 biz/SaaS sites needing redesign using Playwright, score site quality 1-10 on mobile/speed/modernity

send emails via SMTP, log results, flag replies for human follow-up
